title: Doosri Dulhan
desc: Renu and her husband, Anil, are devastated when she cannot bear children after a miscarriage. But soon, he visits a brothel and asks young Chanda to carry and give birth to a baby for his family.

title: Ek Hassina Do Deewane
desc: Amar, an orthodox businessman marries Neeta; slowly he starts mentally torturing her which leads to their divorce. Amar makes a deal with Neeta before filing for a divorce. Will she agree?

title: Haathi Mere Saathi
desc: Raju becomes very attached to his four elephants after they save his life. His wife, however, fears for her child and tells him that he must choose between the animals and his family.

title: Kasak
desc: Divya, a young woman, loves Suraj, who dies an unfortunate and untimely death. She is soon forced to marry Vijay due to familial pressure but not long after demands that he divorce her.

title: Doosri Dulhan
desc: Renu and her husband, Anil, are devastated when she cannot bear children after a miscarriage. But soon, he visits a brothel and asks young Chanda to carry and give birth to a baby for his family.
